zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Singleton於1179年之前出生在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆時，他的父親Richard de Singleton24歲，母親Katherine25歲。他於大約1215年與Alice Winwick結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1244年11月16日在英國藍卡爾加斯堂，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾吉可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Singleton was born before 1179, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard de Singleton, was 24 and his mother, Katherine, was 25. He married Alice Winwick about 1215. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 16 November 1244, in Garstang, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Singleton est né avant 1179, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Singleton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Katherine, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Winwick environ 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1244, à Garstang, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Singleton vor 1179 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Singleton 24 und seine Mutter Katherine 25. Er hat um 1215 Alice Winwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. November 1244 in Garstang, Lancashire, England und wurde in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Winwick circa 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 novembre 1244, nel Garstang, Lancashire, England, e fu sepolto a Kirkham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Poulton Le Fylde, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 파우턴 일 피드
ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Singleton(이)가 1179년 이전 영국 랭카실르 커크함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Singleton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1215년 Alice Winwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 11월 16일 영국 랭카실르 가스탠그에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 커크함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Singleton nasceu antes 1179, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Singleton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Katherine, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Winwick aproximadamente 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1244, em Garstang, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Singleton родился перед 1179 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Singleton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Winwick около 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 ноября 1244 г. в местности гарстанг, ланкашир, Англия и был похоронен в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
